tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param: Run `make py-fast-ci` and report the results. This runs lint, format check, ty, and unit tests. Report any failures in detail.

session.tool_result:
Excellent! All tests and checks passed successfully.
## Results Summary
**make py-fast-ci: PASSED**
All components completed successfully:
- **Lint**: All checks passed! - **Format Check**: 1594 files already formatted - **Type checking (ty)**: All checks passed! - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5549 passed in 23.20s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.67s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.88s
**Total**: 5800 tests passed across all test suites with no failures, format issues, lint violations, or type errors. agentId: aea54d3 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)
session.assistant: All CI checks pass. Let me also quickly verify the pyproject.toml doesn't have references to erkbot:

tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Delete the erkbot package directory', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': '...[truncated 923 chars]...hecks'}, {'content': 'Submit PR', 'status': 'in_progress', 'activeForm': 'Submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable

Exit code 1 Error: Unexpected error in generate_description: [Errno 7] Argument list too long: 'claude'
🚀 Submitting PR...
Resolving branch and plan context... Committing uncommitted changes... Checking for existing PR... Phase 1: Creating or Updating PR PR #8658 found (already exists)
Phase 2: Getting diff
Phase 3: Fetching plan context Incorporating plan #8658
Phase 4: Generating PR description Reading diff file... Diff loaded (186,761 chars) Analyzing changes with Claude...
session.assistant: The diff is too large for `erk pr submit` to generate a description. Let me commit and push manually, then update the PR.
session.tool_result:
On branch plnd/delete-erkbot-package-03-03-0525 Your branch is up to date with 'origin/plnd/delete-erkbot-package-03-03-0525'.
nothing to commit, working tree clean
session.assistant: Looks like `erk pr submit` already committed the changes before the description generation failed. Let me check recent commits:
session.tool_result: 02a4d4e8c WIP: Prepare for PR submission c492657a3 Remove plan staging dirs before implementation f9887372d Update plan for plan #8658 (rerun) 62506a3be Add plan for PR #8658 713334bd7 Add plan: Delete erkbot package
session.assistant: The commit message is "WIP: Prepare for PR submission" - that's fine, it was auto-committed by erk pr submit. Let me push and update the PR manually:
Already pushed. Let me check the PR state and update the description:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: gh pr view 8658 --json title,state,isDraft,url -q '{title: .title, state: .state, isDraft: .isDraft, url: .url}'

session.assistant: The PR is still a draft with the plan title. Let me update the title, add a description, and mark it ready:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param:
gh pr edit 8658 --title "Delete erkbot package" --body "$(cat <<'EOF' ## Summary
Remove t...[truncated 913 chars]...erences in codebase
🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code) EOF )"

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Mark PR as ready for review

session.tool_result: ✓ Pull request dagster-io/erk#8658 is marked as "ready for review"

tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Delete the erkbot package directory', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': '...[truncated 921 chars]... checks'}, {'content': 'Submit PR', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete.
**Summary of changes:**
1. **Deleted `packages/erkbot/`** — All source code (~23 files), tests (~23 files), Makefile, pyproject.toml, README, SETUP 2. **Deleted erkbot documentation** — 4 doc files + 1 directory from `docs/learned/` 3. **Updated Makefile** — Removed `test-erkbot` target, `slackbot` target, and erkbot lines from `py-fast-ci`, `fast-ci`, `all-ci` 4. **Updated `.github/workflows/ci.yml`** — Removed `erkbot-tests` job and references from `ci-summarize` 5. **Regenerated `uv.lock`** — Dropped 21 packages (slack-bolt, slack-sdk, claude-agent-sdk, etc.) 6. **Cleaned stale references** — Updated 5 doc files with erkbot mentions (CI job ordering, conventions, CLI checklists, refactoring docs) 7. **Regenerated auto-generated files** — `erk docs sync` updated index and tripwire files
**Verification:** All 5800 tests pass, zero erkbot references remain in the codebase.
**PR:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8658
